results.title: Fabrizio Romano made Chelsea’s stance on Granit Xhaka crystal clear
results.description: Chelsea are faced with the prospect of losing star defensive midfielder Enzo Fernandez, but, so far, the Argentinian international looks more likely to stay with Real Madrid balking at the asking price.
